name: Kirk Franklin
description: '''Kirk Dewayne Franklin''' (born January 26, 1970) is an American gospel singer, songwriter, rapper, record producer, and choir director. Franklin's accolades include 20 [[Grammy Awards]], and ''[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]'' has called him a "Reigning King of Urban Gospel", with Franklin being one of the inaugural inductees into the [[Black Music & Entertainment Walk of Fame]]. In his earlier career, his act included choirs such as the Family, [[God's Property]], and [[One Nation Crew]] (1NC).
